content.query:
create view v_GWT_Sales_Budget
as
SELECT DISTINCT 
                         'G' AS Company, ISNULL(A.Description, '') AS 'Customer Area Description', SM.ShipAddress4 AS 'ShipTo State', SM.ShipPostalCode AS 'ShipTo ZipCode', Det.SalesOrder AS 'Sales Order', Det.Invoice AS 'Invoice', 
                         Det.CustomerPoNumber AS 'Customer PO', 
                         CASE Det.DocumentType WHEN 'I' THEN 'Invoice' WHEN 'C' THEN 'Credit Note' WHEN 'D' THEN 'Debit Note' WHEN 'i' THEN 'Dispatch Invoice' ELSE 'ERROR ERROR' END AS 'Doc Type Description', Br.Branch AS 'Branch', 
                         Br.Description AS 'Branch Description', Cust.BuyingGroup1 AS 'Buying Grp Code', Cust.Customer AS 'Customer #', Cust.Name AS 'Customer Name', ISNULL(Cust.CustomerClass, '') AS 'Customer Class Code', 
                         ISNULL(CCL.Description, '') AS 'Customer Class', ISNULL(Inv.Supplier, '') AS 'Supplier Code', ISNULL(Sup.SupplierName, '') AS 'Supplier Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN Cust.MasterAccount WHEN 'A' THEN Cust.MasterAccount ELSE Cust.Customer END AS 'Master Account', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN CustMaster.Name WHEN 'A' THEN CustMaster.Name ELSE Cust.Name END AS 'Master Account Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN MA.Description WHEN 'A' THEN MA.Description ELSE A.Description END AS 'Master Area Description', Det.Salesperson AS 'Sales Rep Code', SalRep.Name AS 'SalesRep Name', 
                         Cust.Salesperson1 AS 'Sales Mgr Code', ISNULL(SalMgr.Name, '') AS 'SalesMgr Name', Det.ProductClass AS 'Product Class', PC.Description AS 'Product Class Description', Det.InvoiceDate AS 'Invoice Date', DATENAME(dw, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Day', DATEPART(month, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Month', DATEPART(quarter, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Qtr', DATEPART(week, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Week', CAST(DATEPART(year, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS varchar(10)) AS 'Invoice Year', 
                         CASE Det.LineType WHEN '1' THEN '1 - Stock Item' WHEN '4' THEN '4 - Freight' WHEN '5' THEN '5 - Misc Charge' WHEN '6' THEN '6 - Comment' WHEN '7' THEN '7 - Non Stock' END AS 'Line Type Description', 
                         ISNULL(WH.Description, '') AS 'Warehouse Name', Det.StockCode AS 'StockCode', CASE Det.StockCode WHEN '' THEN '' ELSE Inv.Description END AS 'StockCode Description', Det.QtyInvoiced AS 'Qty invoiced', 
                         CASE Det.QtyInvoiced WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE NetSalesValue / QtyInvoiced END AS 'Sale Price', Det.DiscValue AS 'Disc Value', Det.NetSalesValue AS 'Net Sales Value', (Det.DiscValue + Det.NetSalesValue) 
                         AS 'Gross Sales Value', Det.CostValue AS 'Cost', (Det.NetSalesValue - Det.CostValue) AS 'Margin Dollars'
FROM            SCG.ArTrnDetail AS Det LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvWhControl AS WH ON WH.Warehouse = Det.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalBranch AS Br ON Br.Branch = Det.Branch LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SorMaster AS SM ON SM.SalesOrder = Det.SalesOrder LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS Cust ON Det.Customer = Cust.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS CustMaster ON Cust.MasterAccount = CustMaster.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.TblCustomerClass AS CCL ON Cust.CustomerClass = CCL.Class LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalProductClassDes AS PC ON Det.ProductClass = PC.ProductClass LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalRep ON (Det.Salesperson = SalRep.Salesperson AND Det.Branch = SalRep.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalMgr ON (Cust.Salesperson1 = SalMgr.Salesperson AND Cust.Branch = SalMgr.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvMaster AS Inv ON Det.StockCode = Inv.StockCode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS A ON A.Area = Cust.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS MA ON MA.Area = CustMaster.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ApSupplier AS Sup ON Inv.Supplier = Sup.Supplier
WHERE        (Det.SalesGlIntReqd <> 'N') AND (Det.InvoiceDate >= DATEADD(yy, 0, DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0)) AND Det.InvoiceDate <= GETDATE())
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT 
                         'G' AS Company, ISNULL(A.Description, '') AS 'Customer Area Description', SM.ShipAddress4 AS 'ShipTo State', SM.ShipPostalCode AS 'ShipTo ZipCode', Det.SalesOrder AS 'Sales Order', Det.Invoice AS 'Invoice', 
                         Det.CustomerPoNumber AS 'Customer PO', 
                         CASE Det.DocumentType WHEN 'I' THEN 'Invoice' WHEN 'C' THEN 'Credit Note' WHEN 'D' THEN 'Debit Note' WHEN 'i' THEN 'Dispatch Invoice' ELSE 'ERROR ERROR' END AS 'Doc Type Description', Br.Branch AS 'Branch', 
                         Br.Description AS 'Branch Description', Cust.BuyingGroup1 AS 'Buying Grp Code', Cust.Customer AS 'Customer #', Cust.Name AS 'Customer Name', ISNULL(Cust.CustomerClass, '') AS 'Customer Class Code', 
                         ISNULL(CCL.Description, '') AS 'Customer Class', ISNULL(Inv.Supplier, '') AS 'Supplier Code', ISNULL(Sup.SupplierName, '') AS 'Supplier Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN Cust.MasterAccount WHEN 'A' THEN Cust.MasterAccount ELSE Cust.Customer END AS 'Master Account', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN CustMaster.Name WHEN 'A' THEN CustMaster.Name ELSE Cust.Name END AS 'Master Account Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN MA.Description WHEN 'A' THEN MA.Description ELSE A.Description END AS 'Master Area Description', Det.Salesperson AS 'Sales Rep Code', SalRep.Name AS 'SalesRep Name', 
                         Cust.Salesperson1 AS 'Sales Mgr Code', ISNULL(SalMgr.Name, '') AS 'SalesMgr Name', Det.ProductClass AS 'Product Class', PC.Description AS 'Product Class Description', Det.InvoiceDate AS 'Invoice Date', DATENAME(dw, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Day', DATEPART(month, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Month', DATEPART(quarter, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Qtr', DATEPART(week, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Week', CAST(DATEPART(year, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS varchar(10)) AS 'Invoice Year', 
                         CASE Det.LineType WHEN '1' THEN '1 - Stock Item' WHEN '4' THEN '4 - Freight' WHEN '5' THEN '5 - Misc Charge' WHEN '6' THEN '6 - Comment' WHEN '7' THEN '7 - Non Stock' END AS 'Line Type Description', 
                         ISNULL(WH.Description, '') AS 'Warehouse Name', Det.StockCode AS 'StockCode', CASE Det.StockCode WHEN '' THEN '' ELSE Inv.Description END AS 'StockCode Description', Det.QtyInvoiced AS 'Qty invoiced', 
                         CASE Det.QtyInvoiced WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE NetSalesValue / QtyInvoiced END AS 'Sale Price', Det.DiscValue AS 'Disc Value', Det.NetSalesValue AS 'Net Sales Value', (Det.DiscValue + Det.NetSalesValue) 
                         AS 'Gross Sales Value', Det.CostValue AS 'Cost', (Det.NetSalesValue - Det.CostValue) AS 'Margin Dollars'
FROM            SCG.ArTrnDetail AS Det LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvWhControl AS WH ON WH.Warehouse = Det.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalBranch AS Br ON Br.Branch = Det.Branch LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SorMaster AS SM ON SM.SalesOrder = Det.SalesOrder LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS Cust ON Det.Customer = Cust.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS CustMaster ON Cust.MasterAccount = CustMaster.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.TblCustomerClass AS CCL ON Cust.CustomerClass = CCL.Class LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalProductClassDes AS PC ON Det.ProductClass = PC.ProductClass LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalRep ON (Det.Salesperson = SalRep.Salesperson AND Det.Branch = SalRep.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalMgr ON (Cust.Salesperson1 = SalMgr.Salesperson AND Cust.Branch = SalMgr.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvMaster AS Inv ON Det.StockCode = Inv.StockCode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS A ON A.Area = Cust.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS MA ON MA.Area = CustMaster.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ApSupplier AS Sup ON Inv.Supplier = Sup.Supplier
WHERE        (Det.SalesGlIntReqd <> 'N') AND (Det.InvoiceDate >= DATEADD(yy, - 2, DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0)) AND Det.InvoiceDate <= GETDATE())
UNION ALL
/* START OF 'PREV YTD' AS 'Invoice Year',*/ SELECT DISTINCT 
                         'G' AS Company, A.Description AS 'Customer Area Description', SM.ShipAddress4 AS 'ShipTo State', SM.ShipPostalCode AS 'ShipTo ZipCode', Det.SalesOrder AS 'Sales Order', Det.Invoice AS 'Invoice', 
                         Det.CustomerPoNumber AS 'Customer PO', 
                         CASE Det.DocumentType WHEN 'I' THEN 'Invoice' WHEN 'C' THEN 'Credit Note' WHEN 'D' THEN 'Debit Note' WHEN 'i' THEN 'Dispatch Invoice' ELSE 'ERROR ERROR' END AS 'Doc Type Description', Br.Branch AS 'Branch', 
                         Br.Description AS 'Branch Description', Cust.BuyingGroup1 AS 'Buying Grp Code', Cust.Customer AS 'Customer #', Cust.Name AS 'Customer Name', Cust.CustomerClass AS 'Customer Class Code', 
                         CCL.Description AS 'Customer Class', ISNULL(Inv.Supplier, '') AS 'Supplier Code', ISNULL(Sup.SupplierName, '') AS 'Supplier Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN Cust.MasterAccount WHEN 'A' THEN Cust.MasterAccount ELSE Cust.Customer END AS 'Master Account', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN CustMaster.Name WHEN 'A' THEN CustMaster.Name ELSE Cust.Name END AS 'Master Account Name', 
                         CASE Cust.CustomerType WHEN 'S' THEN MA.Description WHEN 'A' THEN MA.Description ELSE A.Description END AS 'Master Area Description', Det.Salesperson AS 'Sales Rep Code', SalRep.Name AS 'SalesRep Name', 
                         Cust.Salesperson1 AS 'Sales Mgr Code', SalMgr.Name AS 'SalesMgr Name', Det.ProductClass AS 'Product Class', PC.Description AS 'Product Class Description', Det.InvoiceDate AS 'Invoice Date', DATENAME(dw, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Day', DATEPART(month, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Month', DATEPART(quarter, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Qtr', DATEPART(week, Det.InvoiceDate) AS 'Invoice Week', CAST(DATEPART(year, 
                         Det.InvoiceDate) AS varchar(4)) + ' YTD' AS 'Invoice Year', 
                         CASE Det.LineType WHEN '1' THEN '1 - Stock Item' WHEN '4' THEN '4 - Freight' WHEN '5' THEN '5 - Misc Charge' WHEN '6' THEN '6 - Comment' WHEN '7' THEN '7 - Non Stock' END AS 'Line Type Description', 
                         WH.Description AS 'Warehouse Name', Det.StockCode AS 'StockCode', CASE Det.StockCode WHEN '' THEN '' ELSE Inv.Description END AS 'StockCode Description', Det.QtyInvoiced AS 'Qty invoiced', 
                         CASE Det.QtyInvoiced WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE NetSalesValue / QtyInvoiced END AS 'Sale Price', Det.DiscValue AS 'Disc Value', Det.NetSalesValue AS 'Net Sales Value', (Det.DiscValue + Det.NetSalesValue) 
                         AS 'Gross Sales Value', Det.CostValue AS 'Cost', (Det.NetSalesValue - Det.CostValue) AS 'Margin Dollars'
FROM            SCG.ArTrnDetail AS Det LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvWhControl AS WH ON WH.Warehouse = Det.Warehouse LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalBranch AS Br ON Br.Branch = Det.Branch LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SorMaster AS SM ON SM.SalesOrder = Det.SalesOrder LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS Cust ON Det.Customer = Cust.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ArCustomer AS CustMaster ON Cust.MasterAccount = CustMaster.Customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.TblCustomerClass AS CCL ON Cust.CustomerClass = CCL.Class LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalProductClassDes AS PC ON Det.ProductClass = PC.ProductClass LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalRep ON (Det.Salesperson = SalRep.Salesperson AND Det.Branch = SalRep.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalSalesperson AS SalMgr ON (Cust.Salesperson1 = SalMgr.Salesperson AND Cust.Branch = SalMgr.Branch) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.InvMaster AS Inv ON Det.StockCode = Inv.StockCode LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS A ON A.Area = Cust.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.SalArea AS MA ON MA.Area = CustMaster.Area LEFT OUTER JOIN
                         SCG.ApSupplier AS Sup ON Inv.Supplier = Sup.Supplier
WHERE        (Det.SalesGlIntReqd <> 'N') AND (Det.InvoiceDate >= DATEADD(yy, - 1, DATEADD(yy, DATEDIFF(yy, 0, GETDATE()), 0)) AND Det.InvoiceDate <= DATEADD(YEAR, - 1, GETDATE()))
